final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 3×3 character expression grid illustration inspired by the "仙剑奇侠传" IP character "赵灵儿".

Style/medium: needs a 3D animation Pixar-style aesthetic — exact rendering and surface finish are yours
Composition: must be a 3×3 grid layout with 9 panels, each panel showing the character peeking through a torn hole in white paper
Subject: must include "赵灵儿"-inspired young woman with long flowing light-colored hair and delicate fairy-like features (original, non-infringing design), rendered across all 9 panels with the following expressions, actions, and outfits:
  Top-left: winking / adjusting glasses / green sweater
  Top-center: smirking / lowering dark sunglasses / red leather jacket
  Top-right: thinking / finger on chin / yellow hoodie
  Middle-left: big smile / arms resting on edge / black and white striped shirt
  Middle-center: smiling / thumbs up / orange button-up shirt
  Middle-right: neutral / drinking boba tea / blue sweater
  Bottom-left: happy / waving / purple sweater vest over white shirt
  Bottom-center: laughing with eyes closed / arms crossed / pink cardigan
  Bottom-right: silly / poking cheeks / teal sweater
Scene/backdrop: must include torn white paper hole as the framing device in every panel
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, cheerful atmosphere — exact light setup is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant, varied direction across panels — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a clean 3D rendered surface treatment — exact sheen and texture weight are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve consistent character identity across all 9 panels; each panel must show a distinct expression and outfit as listed; torn-paper framing must appear in every panel
Avoid: must avoid realistic photographic style; must avoid 2D flat illustration; must avoid mixing up expressions or outfits across panels
